chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 533 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 23.10.2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this bail application as applicant has been released by the trial Court on stopping proceedings. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
